creator: freebsd@bengrimm.net
text:
Isn't there a way to just rename the private libprotobuf-lite.so to libprotobuf-lite-mysql.so or libprotobuf-lite-private.so during porting, so this doesn't continue to happen:

# ldd /usr/local/libexec/mysqld
